projects.title: Titanic - Machine Learning from Disaster
projects.description: End-to-end ML pipeline predicting Titanic passenger survival. Features EDA, feature engineering (FamilySize, Title extraction), and model comparison. XGBoost classifier achieved 78.4% accuracy on Kaggle.

projects.title: Szeged Weather Regression
projects.description: A regression analysis on the 2006-2016 Szeged weather dataset to model the relationship between humidity and temperature.
